PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 7min 6-under through 16 and tied for the lead!

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 7min The only player to drive the 9th green this week!
Matt Fitzpatrick converts a birdie at the t
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 7min The only player to drive the 9th green this week!
Matt Fitzpatrick converts a birdie at the turn to get back into a tie for the lead @RBC_Heritage .
CBS 2 3 103 7 mil
